generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T AGARICUS CAMPANULATUS. A. campanulatus, Fr. A. ovalis, Fr. (section Galera). A rare species, found in England on dung. Authority. Poisoning cases. ► Recollection restored, and lost again. ► He loses his way. ► He reels about. ► Sudden dimness of vision. ► Countenance expressive of anxiety. ► He can hardly articulate. ► Pulse slow and feeble. ► Languor and weakness. ► Giddiness, debility, trembling and loss of memory. ► Great drowsiness.
